overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing night driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit metropolis, transitioning to third-person on-foot exploration. The clip features futuristic vehicles, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture with pedestrians carrying umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown street with neon storefronts

events.description: passing a large military-style armored truck on the right side
turning right at intersection with neon signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets, steering through intersections with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: large armored truck driving parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: holographic red HUD displays showing speed and navigation data
tall buildings covered in bright holographic advertisements and signage
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night from a first-person vehicle perspective. The dashboard displays holographic red readouts while neon billboards illuminate the wet streets. The vehicle passes a large military truck and navigates through intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk area in front of commercial buildings

events.description: vehicle slows and comes to a complete stop at the curb
perspective shifts from first-person interior to third-person exterior view
character opens car door and steps out onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: parking the vehicle and stepping out onto the sidewalk, transitioning to on-foot exploration

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking past the parked car

entered.detail: futuristic teal sports car with white racing stripes parked at the curb
light blue paved sidewalk tiles with geometric patterns
overhanging structure providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: The vehicle pulls over and stops under a building canopy. The perspective shifts to third-person as the character exits the teal sports car onto the tiled sidewalk. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk past while the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk with palm planters and digital signage

events.description: rain intensity increases with visible droplets falling
pedestrian with umbrella crosses close in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: standing next to the parked sports car, looking around at the street life and neon signs

notable_agents.action: bald man in tank top checking his phone while leaning on the car
woman in long red coat walking with a black umbrella

entered.detail: bright yellow and white neon sign reading MARK 24
large circular planter with palm trees on the sidewalk
futuristic yellow and red automated kiosk

segments.scene_description: Standing on the busy sidewalk next to the parked car, observing the cyberpunk street scene. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk past in both directions. The MARK 24 neon sign glows brightly while rain falls on the pavement. The character leans against the vehicle checking a device.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with futuristic overpass and crosswalks

events.description: character walks away from the vehicle toward the intersection
moving from sidewalk onto the yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the crosswalk, exploring the intersection area with futuristic architecture

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red WAIT text
angular blue-lit structure crossing above the street
futuristic building with sharp geometric angles and red facade

segments.scene_description: Walking away from the parked car through a wide intersection. The camera moves across the yellow striped crosswalk toward a futuristic overpass structure. The angular architecture of the surrounding buildings dominates the view as traffic passes by on the wet streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a high-speed drive through a rain-soaked neon metropolis to a slow, on-foot exploration of its dense urban architecture. It begins from a first-person perspective inside a vehicle, gliding past military trucks and holographic red dashboard readouts under the glow of vibrant billboards. As the teal sports car pulls over beneath a building canopy, the perspective shifts to third-person, following the character as they step out onto a tiled sidewalk amidst pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The scene then lingers on the bustling street where the bright MARK 24 neon sign reflects off the wet pavement while the character pauses to check a device. Finally, the camera moves away from the parked car, crossing a yellow-striped intersection toward a massive futuristic overpass as the angular silhouettes of surrounding skyscrapers dominate the rainy skyline.
